_comment: Index of GrowthStackr short-form background music beds. Every track in assets/music/ has one entry here; compositions reference beds by `id`. The entries below are EXAMPLE / PLACEHOLDER records — their `file` paths point at audio that is NOT added yet. Replace with real cleared audio and log each in licenses/music-licenses.md before use. Schema per entry: id, file, bpm, mood, energy, loopable, vocals, best_for, license. See README.md for the mood -> video-type mapping. Bed volume rides ~0.08-0.10, always under the voice; no vocals under talking-head footage.

music.license: PLACEHOLDER — not yet added; commercial-cleared source required
